testcase.name: test_worker_activates_then_deactivates

failure.message: AssertionError: Worker did not activate boost within 80s assert False

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter115_boost_schedules.py:289: in test_worker_activates_then_deactivates assert active, "Worker did not activate boost within 80s" E AssertionError: Worker did not activate boost within 80s E assert False
